DP.113.0000:
The Contests are interesting, but the
ruins of Solaceon Town are as well...
DP.113.0001:
As a cameraman, it makes me happy
to see all sorts of Pokémon involved\r
in Contests.
DP.113.0002:
I traveled a long way to take part
in these Contests.
DP.113.0003:
Fantina’s the Gym Leader.
That lady baffles me.
DP.113.0004:
I’ve given my Pokémon lots of Poffins.\f
I’m confident that we’ll win our share
of Contests.
DP.113.0005:
There’s a Day Care in Solaceon Town
that raises Pokémon for you.
